name: academorix/requests
purpose: Access-request projection over the workflow approvals engine — surfaces role- and permission-request lifecycle as a first-class UX for admins.
capabilities: Request submission, review, approval, denial flow
when_to_use: A tenant user requests a role or permission grant that requires admin approval before taking effect.
when_not_to_use: For synchronous role assignment by an admin with authority to grant directly, use academorix/rbac.
